
# UniTool - All-in-One Professional Utility App

UniTool is a comprehensive suite of 40+ professional-grade utilities for Android, focusing on media management, security, and document processing.

## Core Capabilities

- **Private Media Vault**: Military-grade AES-256 encryption for securely hiding photos and videos. Everything is processed and stored locally on the device.
- **WhatsApp Status Saver**: Save and share photos or videos from WhatsApp statuses. Uses local storage access without cloud uploads.
- **Universal File Conversion**: Convert between Audio, Video, PDF, and Image formats (100+ supported formats).
- **AI-Powered Tools**: Intelligent background removal, image upscaling (HD enhancement), and AI writing assistants.
- **PDF Suite**: Complete toolkit for merging, splitting, compressing, and editing PDF documents.
- **Education & Utility**: Step-by-step math solvers, age calculators, mobile comparisons, and student ID generators.

## Principles

- **Privacy First**: Offline-first architecture. Media processing occurs on-device.
- **Security**: AES-256 encryption for the media vault.
- **Speed**: Quantized local AI models for smart tool discovery.
